CustomField.description: For use with Lottery Reporting TASK0198615. WWhen a Proposed Lottery Application is moved to the main "Lottery Application Level" Field, the old Lottery Application Audit will be moved here to help track why the app changed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When a Proposed Lottery Application is moved to the main "Lottery Application Level" Field, the old Lottery Application Audit will be moved here to help track why the app changed.
CustomField.label: Replaced Lottery Application Level Audit
